summary.note: Read strict daily accuracy separately from weighted accuracy.

definitions.strictDaily: Short-horizon direction correctness. Can be very low during warm-up.
definitions.weightedAccuracy: Broader score; may credit partial progress, target approach, and avoiding stops.
definitions.after3_5_10: Recommendation performance after enough sessions, more meaningful than same-day.
definitions.targetHitRate: Share of measured recommendations reaching target.
definitions.stopHitRate: Share of measured recommendations hitting stop; lower is better.
